text: Inside this modern, glass-walled space, I am enveloped by an atmosphere of innovation and inquiry. The 'R+D' exhibit calls to mind our ceaseless drive to understand and shape the world through research and development. I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation—an eagerness to engage with new ideas and to reflect on how technology shapes our human experience. This is a place for contemplation, discovery, and the subtle thrill of being on the cusp of new knowledge.
